html:
Annexure B
ROYAL UNIVERSITY OF BHUTAN
PARENTAL UNDERTAKING
I, Mr./Mrs. {{ doc.parent_name or "" }} father/mother/legal guardian of Mr./Ms. {{ doc.student_name or "" }} Programme {{ doc.programme or "" }} Semester {{ doc.semester or "" }} Year {{ doc.year or "" }} bearing Student No. {{ doc.student or "" }} hereby undertake and affirm that:
  1. I accept my son/daughter has had disciplinary problem(s) in the College in the past.
  2. I accept this undertaking to serve as a LAST WARNING to my son/daughter.
  3. I assure the College Disciplinary Committee (CDC) that my son/daughter will improve his/her behaviour.
  4. My son/daughter will abide by the Student Code of Conduct of the Royal University of Bhutan.
  5. Henceforth in the event of my son/daughter’s misconduct, I shall accept suspension/termination decided by the CDC.
I hereby, respect and bear all the responsibilities to adhere to such course of actions henceforth.
Parent’s Name:{{ doc.parent_name or "" }}
Present Address:{{ doc.parent_address or "" }}
Contact No.{{ doc.contact_number or "" }}
Email address:{{ doc.email or "" }}
Date:{{ doc.posting_date or frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.creation) if doc.creation else "" }}
(Affix legal stamp and signature)
Student’s Name:{{ doc.student_name or "" }}
Contact No.{{ doc.phone_number or "" }}
Email address:{{ doc.email or "" }}
Signature{{ doc.signature or "" }}
Date:{{ doc.date or frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.creation) if doc.creation else "" }}
For College Discipline Committee
Dean of Student Affairs
Date
name: Parental Undertaking
